intitule: Reading Comprehension: A Simple Family Tree

enonce.texte:
Look at the family tree below and answer the questions that follow.

John's Family Tree

David (father) married to Mary (mother)

|

John (son) - Sarah (daughter)

John is 12 years old. Sarah is 10 years old.
images: A simple family tree diagram showing David and Mary as parents, and John and Sarah as their children, with lines connecting them.

questions.texte: What is the name of John's sister?

enonce.texte: Match the words on the left with their definitions on the right. Write the correct letter next to each number.
images: Simple illustrations of family members: a mother, father, brother, sister, and two children.

questions.texte: Match the words with their definitions:

sousQuestions.reponse: c. A mother and father together

enonce.texte:
Listen to the dialogue between two friends and answer the questions below.

Dialogue Transcript

Paul: "Hello, Marie. Who is that in the picture?"
Marie: "That is my family. This is my mother, her name is Anne. This is my father, his name is Peter. This is my brother, his name is Mark. This is my sister, her name is Lisa. And I am Marie."
Paul: "You have a nice family, Marie!"
images: A picture of a family with five people: a mother, father, son, daughter, and another daughter.

questions.texte: What is the name of Marie's mother?
What is the name of Marie's brother?
How many children are in Marie's family?
questions.reponse: There are three children: Marie, Mark, and Lisa.

enonce.texte:
Read the sentences and write the correct family member.

Words: mother, father, brother, sister, parents, children
images: Simple silhouette icons of family members with labels: mother, father, brother, sister.

questions.texte: My mother and father are my ________.

enonce.texte: Write a short paragraph (3-4 sentences) describing your nuclear family. Mention your mother, father, brothers, and sisters if you have them.
images: A simple illustration of a family with a mother, father, two children (a boy and a girl), smiling together.

questions.reponse:
This is a creative writing task. Example response:
"My name is Jean. I have a small nuclear family. My mother's name is Marie. My father's name is Pierre. I have one sister, and her name is Amina. I love my family very much."

enonce.texte:
Prepare a short oral presentation about your nuclear family. Use the following structure:

Presentation Structure:

  1. Introduce yourself
  2. Say who is in your family
  3. Say each person's name
  4. Say how many brothers or sisters you have
images: A child standing in front of a classroom, speaking to classmates, with a simple family drawing on the board behind them.

questions.texte: Prepare a short oral presentation about your nuclear family.
questions.reponse:
Example presentation:
"Hello, my name is Amina. I have a nuclear family. My mother's name is Fatima. My father's name is Ahmed. I have two brothers and one sister. I love my family."

enonce.texte:
Look at the family tree and answer the questions.

Family Tree

Paul (father) married to Claire (mother)

|

Thomas (son) - Julie (daughter) - Peter (son)
images: A simple family tree diagram with Paul and Claire as parents, and Thomas, Julie, and Peter as their children.

questions.reponse: Claire is the mother of Thomas, Julie, and Peter.

questions.texte: How many children do Paul and Claire have?
questions.reponse: They have three children: Thomas, Julie, and Peter.

questions.texte: What is the name of Thomas's sister?
